products.title: High-stim pre-workout built for serious athletes. Delivers fast activation, tunnel focus, and sustained energy without crash.Flip the switch. Train like you mean it.

twitter.title: Father of Insane Pre Workout | Extreme Energy & Focus
twitter.description: High stimulant pre workout for insane energy, strength & endurance. Built for advanced athletes.

keyBenefits: Rapid CNS Activation – Feel the switch-on within minutes
Tunnel Vision Focus – Lock into every rep with precision
Explosive Strength Output – Lift heavier with better control
Sustained Energy Curve – No sudden crash, no burnout
Multi-Source Caffeine System – Smooth, layered stimulation
Aggression Without Anxiety – Controlled intensity for serious lifters
whychooseus: No underdosed formulas. No hidden blends.
Multi-layer stimulant architecture—not just caffeine overload
Built for advanced athletes, not casual users
Designed to activate CNS + muscular output together
products.howToUse: Start by taking half a scoop, as this is very important to assess how your body responds. Consume it about 20–30 minutes before your training session so it has enough time to take effect. Before increasing the dosage, carefully evaluate your tolerance to avoid any unwanted side effects. It’s best to use it on heavy training days, during PR sessions, or for high-intensity workouts when you need an extra boost.
whatToAvoid: Do not use if you are a beginner
Avoid combining with other high-stimulant products
Do not consume close to sleep time
Not suitable for individuals sensitive to stimulants
